_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the screen-capture handle-invalid scenario (screen-capture-handle-invalid playbook). The agent chains: folders list -> jobs list --state Faulted -> jobs get (Info: Win32Exception handle invalid at CopyFromScreen) -> jobs logs (no active interactive desktop) -> jobs traces (Take Screenshot faulted, prior activities Succeeded) -> users get (LoginToConsole=false, unattended). Fix: enable Login to Console / ensure a live session. Keys are stable.
